claims.summary: The historical proposal window presents an additive 12D glimpse as not yet implemented.
claims.disposition: Implemented lifecycle-index recognition for the repository's Current-State Addendum, Introspection Response, and Verification Note headings so later source truth becomes an exact continuation.

claims.summary: Current source already provides additive 12D glimpse machinery while preserving the wider live representation.
claims.disposition: Verified 48D transport, 12D companion derivation, Minime memory-bank use, residual lineage, and companion-not-replacement evidence in source and tests.

claims.summary: A 12D glimpse may be misread as legacy slot semantics or silently replace the canonical vector.
claims.disposition: Verified exact 12D width/finite guards, contextual anchors, representation contracts, no live-vector write, and explicit fallback to 48D/residual evidence.

claims.summary: A PCA-reduced 12D representation should replace or alter live transport during restart.
claims.disposition: Preserve an exact Tier 5 protocol/codec wait because changing live representation or transport requires compatibility, capture, consumer-first rollout, abort criteria, and felt review.
